name: TestReportFileName
title: TestReportFileName
description: Sets the name and path of a report file.In the CANoe GUI the name and path of a report file can be set. With this function these settings can be overwritten.

parameters.name: data name
parameters.description: Name and path of the report file. Without path specification, the directory of the CANoe configuration file is used. The extension .xml, .html or .vtestreport is added automatically.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
